# Feature: Crawl chrome/devtools noise filter

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-17 — do not edit manually unless correcting intent -->

## Intent
Forced `--crawl` produces shallow flows and steps that click third-party chrome (e.g. TanStack Query Devtools). Filter known chrome/devtools patterns so crawl prefers host controls. Generic — no browo hardcodes.

## Preconditions
- Interactive crawl (`filterSafeClickCandidates` / `crawlUncoveredRoutes`) exists

## Happy Path
- [ ] Crawl candidates exclude common third-party/devtools chrome (TanStack Query Devtools, React DevTools-like overlays)
- [ ] Where the page has safe labeled host controls, multi-step flows prefer those over chrome widgets
- [ ] Destructive / unsafe labels still skipped via `isSafeAction`
- [ ] Unit/integration tests with fixture HTML covering noise filter + useful click
- [ ] Docs note generic chrome filters
- [ ] No browo-specific hardcodes

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty label with chrome-like class/id still filtered in collect path
- [ ] Host button whose label coincidentally contains “settings” still allowed

## Regression
- [ ] Existing interactive crawl tests still pass
- [ ] `isSafeAction` destructive skip unchanged

## Assumptions
- Pattern list is YAGNI-curated common tooling chrome, not host-app selectors

## Screenshots
| Step | Filename |
|------|----------|
| n/a | CLI/Playwright only |

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/playwright/src/crawl.ts` — `isChromeNoise` + filter in `filterSafeClickCandidates`; prefer named labels
- Tests: chrome filter unit case + fixture HTML with TanStack-like button
- Docs: `docs/api/cli.md` notes generic chrome skip
